Update Coloring System
La destinazione è ALS Chuck BP

Update Held Object Animations
La destinazione è ALS Chuck BP

IMPORTANT!!!

This blueprint is a child of the ALS_Base_CharacterBP and contains dynamic coloring logic for debugging purposes (press 'U' to display). It also provides placeholder functionality for equiping a held object (not gameplay ready). There is currently no inventory or weapon management system.

Its other primary function is to override certian functions within the Base_Character to update the camera target information and to properly select montages based on the current Overlay State.


All Overriden Functions:

     - BPI_Get_3P_PivotTarget
     - BPI_Get_FP_CameraTarget
     - BPI_Get_3P_TraceParams

     - OnOverlayStateChanged

     - GetRollAnimation

     - GetMantleAsset
     - MantleEnd
     - MantleStart

     - GetGetUpAnimation
     - RagdollStart
     - RagdollEnd

IMPORTANT!!!

This blueprint is a child of the ALS_Base_CharacterBP and contains dynamic coloring logic for debugging purposes (press 'U' to display). It also provides placeholder functionality for equiping a held object (not gameplay ready). There is currently no inventory or weapon management system.

Its other primary function is to override certian functions within the Base_Character to update the camera target information and to properly select montages based on the current Overlay State.


All Overriden Functions:

     - BPI_Get_3P_PivotTarget
     - BPI_Get_FP_CameraTarget
     - BPI_Get_3P_TraceParams

     - OnOverlayStateChanged

     - GetRollAnimation

     - GetMantleAsset
     - MantleEnd
     - MantleStart

     - GetGetUpAnimation
     - RagdollStart
     - RagdollEnd

semanticSummary.summary: Blueprint probabilmente collegato a 'ALS / Locomotion' in base a nome e path; riepilogo statico da metadati e struttura dei grafi.
notes: Classificazione euristica dedotta da nome, path e tipo asset (ALS / Locomotion).
